description: Construction progress checkpoint emitted by ConstructionOrchestrationCell (phase 3, leaderNode joseph) and processed by CommissioningCell (phase 4). **Witness invariant (constitutional, per `20-actors/kuni-umi/CLAUDE.md`)**: N ≥ 2 independent robot DID signatures REQUIRED. Records with N=1 are STRUCTURALLY rejected by this Lexicon schema (minLength 2); MstListener additionally enforces Council Lv6+ escalation on N=1 attempts. The robot DIDs MUST be distinct (no duplicate). Per ADR-2605201400 + ADR-2605192415.

checkpointPhase.description: Construction phase. Records MUST be emitted in monotonic phase order — a later phase implies all earlier phases passed.

robotWitnessSignatures.description: **Constitutional witness invariant**: ≥2 independent robot DID signatures. Per CLAUDE.md: 'N=1 で MST に書き込もうとした場合 MstListener が即 reject + Council escalation Lv6+ 通知'. The robotDids in this array MUST be distinct.

fieldTelemetryIpfsCid.description: Optional IPFS CID of field telemetry (sensor logs / photos / construction-arm trajectory replay) for this checkpoint.

deviationsFromPlan.description: Any deviations from proposeDeploymentPlan; non-empty triggers a council review window before commissioning.

robotDid.description: DID of form `did:web:etzhayyim.com:kuniumi:robot:<serial>`. Independence: any two robotWitnessSignatures[].robotDid MUST differ (no duplicate robot signing twice as the 'second' witness).

sensorSnapshotIpfsCid.description: IPFS CID of the robot's on-board sensor snapshot at the checkpoint moment (independent attestation of physical state).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over (progressId + checkpointPhase + checkpointReachedAt + sensorSnapshotIpfsCid).
